1782590.name: From The Bunker
1782590.description:
A catastrophe has struck a small southern town – a viral outbreak occurred at a laboratory of a popular pharmaceutical company. Authorities tried to contain the situation, but failed, and the virus quickly spiraled out of control. The infected broke free, plunging the city into chaos. The dead began to rise, swelling the ranks of zombies, and the epidemic spread rapidly to neighboring regions. Only the fight for survival offers a chance not to become one of them.

In From The Bunker, you become the leader of a group of survivors who’ve managed to find shelter during the zombie apocalypse. But your problems don’t end here: you must defend your bunker against waves of the infected, raiders, and other threats. You’ll need to manage scarce resources wisely, explore the world around you, scavenge vital supplies, and build relationships with fellow survivors. You decide who gets to enter the bunker and who is left outside.

Explore the ruined world and scavenge for valuable resources:

The disaster changed everything – now each day is a fight for survival. Venture beyond the bunker to find weapons, medicine, supplies, and other crucial resources. Explore ruined streets, abandoned shops, and military depots, but be careful: lurking in the shadows are not only zombies, but desperate people willing to do anything to survive.

Build, craft, and fortify your bunker against enemies:

The bunker is your last hope. Upgrade it, strengthen its defenses, build new structures and workstations. Construct a generator for electricity, upgrade the boiler for clean water, build barricades, and set traps to protect yourself from infected attacks and looters.

Make decisions that can change everything:

Every day is a new challenge. Who will you allow into the bunker? Who will you leave behind? Will you share your supplies with allies or keep them for your own team? Your choices shape the survivors’ fate, affect their morale, and determine their willingness to fight. Any decision could be your last.

Fight for survival, every blow could be your last:

When the bullets run out, anything you can get your hands on becomes a weapon. Use melee weapons, the environment, and tactical tricks to survive zombie encounters. Manage your survivors based on their strengths, but remember: their physical and mental conditions directly influence the outcome of battles. One wrong move, and death is unavoidable.
1782590.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 乌克兰语*, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
